ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the type of transaction */,
  "osr_customer_no" TEXT /* Customer number in the OSR system */,
  "reference_no" TEXT /* Reference number associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Transaction amount with two decimal places */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was processed */,
  "validity_date" TEXT /* Validity date of the transaction */,
  "osr_post_counter" TEXT /* OSR post counter values */,
  "osr_plus_post_counter" TEXT /* OSR+ post counter values */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the transaction was processed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_osr_customer_no FOREIGN KEY ("osr_customer_no") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_code FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_code") REFERENCES transaction_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction code */,
  "code" TEXT /* The transaction code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction code */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction code is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the transaction code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_no" TEXT /* Customer number in the OSR system */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction reference */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the reference is associated with */,
  "reference_no" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "validity_date" TEXT /* Validity date of the transaction reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_references_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_amounts" (
  "amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction amount */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the amount is associated with */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Transaction amount with two decimal places */,
  "formatted_amount" TEXT /* Formatted transaction amount with leading zeros */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the amount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_amounts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction date */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the date is associated with */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was processed */,
  "validity_date" TEXT /* Validity date of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the date was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_dates_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_counters" (
  "counter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction counter */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the counter is associated with */,
  "osr_post_counter" TEXT /* OSR post counter values */,
  "osr_plus_post_counter" TEXT /* OSR+ post counter values */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the counter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the counter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_counters_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction validation */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the validation is associated with */,
  "check_digit" TEXT /* Check digit for the transaction */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_validations_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., clerk, supervisor, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
